utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All seven items are present and fully specified with required details.
